channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping, 4th April
item.description:
Dumped household waste

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glyndon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Someone keeps dumping rubbish here, 4th April
item.description:
Keeps happening.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 45, Furzehill Square, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More flytipping on bin., 4th April
item.description:
Looks like a headboard and a shopping trolley (not supermarket) and general rubbish.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kings Highway, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outstanding line painting, 4th April
item.description:
You have had an outstanding order to paint white lines on the corners near st Mary cray station but it never gets done. Why?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 45, Furzehill Square, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on telecoms cabenets, 4th April
item.description:
Graffiti again
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 281, Leesons Hill, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous potholes, 4th April
item.description:
I am a cyclist and these potholes are getting worse. What are you not attending to them?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 281, Leesons Hill, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on Information Map, 4th April
item.description:
There is graffiti on the information map on this shelter.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shrewsbury Lane, Shooters Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (offensive)

item.title: Bin stores damaged, 4th April
item.description:
Bin shed is broke cant get access to remove bins so binmen aint emptying bins

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bevan Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Exposed lighting on street light, 4th April
item.description:
Wire exposed. Cant remember which light it was but closer to church road along the alleyway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 175, Church Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Badly fitting water access cover, 4th April
item.description:
It's a bit loose, and when our dog stepped on it, it spun around and his leg went down the hole. No harm done this time, but an accident/trip hazard waiting to happen.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 128, Amherst Drive, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 4th April
item.description:
This is twice in as many months rubbish has been dumped here

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mill Place, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wait button not working, 4th April
item.description:
It's the button opp the optician on Norwood road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): York Hill, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti needs cleaning, 4th April
item.description:
Graffiti on Eynsford Rec dog waste bin. near car park.needs cleaning

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eynsford Close, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pedestrian traffic lights not working at Shaftesbury avenue/Cambridge circus juntion, 4th April
item.description:
The pedestrian lights are constantly set to red. This means that there is a severe build up of pedestrians on the pavement. There is likely to be an accident as people risk crossing the road without proper functioning lights
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Charing Cross Road, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement blocked due to completely overgrown hedge, 4th April
item.description:
Been like it for months half the pavement taken up. Get it cut down
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsley Wood Drive, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti needs cleaning, 4th April
item.description:
The bin is located along the path next to the horses field it is getting quite close to the woodlands, it has graffiti on it and needs cleaning.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eynsford Close, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cancelation of keep clear box, 4th April
item.description:
After new road asphalt renewal, the existing keep clear sign (yellow lines) in front of the 348 Queenstown Road building was erased. This is causing distress for residents cars when joining the main traffic on Queenstown road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Small piece of graffiti on box, 4th April
item.description:
Seen today, 4th april

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crest View Drive, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain as seen, 4th April
item.description:
Lots of grass etc.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eynsford Close, Crofton, Greater London

item.title: Lots of graffiti just off station square, 4th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Station Square, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
